_meta.purpose: Target catalog for the Summit. High-school users match to universities; university users to companies. Curated REAL entries with an official source link + lastVerified date. 'scope' is 'local' (Malaysia) or 'international'. Local universities carry a 'state' so the engine can surface the ones nearest the student. Edit + restart to update (rows upsert by key).
_meta.status: curated real catalog - guidance, not official advice; verify details on the official site
_meta.scope_note: Local targets rank first, with same-state universities shown under 'Near you'. International targets are grouped under 'Explore abroad' so students can see more options.
_meta.states: Johor, Kedah, Kelantan, Melaka, Negeri Sembilan, Pahang, Perak, Perlis, Pulau Pinang, Sabah, Sarawak, Selangor, Terengganu, Kuala Lumpur, Labuan, Putrajaya
